schema.description: Run the full flaky-test stabilization pipeline on one failure: look up the test's failure history and flaky verdict, triage the CI log into a category, then either heal the flaky test in a sandbox (optionally opening a PR) or draft a structured, PII-gated bug ticket with local duplicate-incident candidates. Returns a JSON envelope with every stage's result and an overall outcome: healed, pr_opened, ticket_created, ticket_ready, or needs_attention.
schema.name: stabilize_test_failure

build_id.description: CI run id — with 'repo', fetches the log via GitHub Actions.

evidence_paths.description: Extra evidence files for the bug branch's PII gate.

log_url_or_path.description: CI log to triage (local path or https URL).

mode.description: Healer mode; 'pr' needs approval (default from config).

project.description: Project key for triage pattern learning.

repo_dir.description: Project checkout for the healer branch (required to heal).

test_id.description: Failing test id ('classname::name', 'file::name', or bare name).

trace_path.description: Optional Playwright trace.zip for healer diagnosis.
